rationale: The cited paper introduces and validates a general brand-engagement scale (BESC), while the citing paper introduces and validates a new category-level construct (BRiC) about how much brands matter, so they are conceptually adjacent on core construct/measurement issues rather than an obviously incidental mention. Given this close overlap in topic and the confirmed DOI match (10.1509/jmkr.46.1.92), the pair could reflect substantive theoretical contrast or construct-positioning and should be reviewed in full.
